a.xlink:title: Implementation of the GreenF base class.
Abstract base class for electromagnetic Green's functions.
Gaussian quadrature helpers for Green's functions and incident fields.
Global numerical constants, fundamental types, and simple macros.
Header file of the class that provides auxiliary mathematical functionalities for the SIE solver.
Exact subtractions for singular/near-singular triangle integrals.
Declarations of Dunavant (triangle) and Gauss–Legendre (1D) quadrature rules.
Declaration of the SurfaceMesh class and mesh edge struct.
Declaration of the Triangle class (surface element with cached geometry).
Lightweight XML-like tag parser for the solver job file.
